title: Benefits Enrollment: Health Insurance and Dental Options
text:
Q: How do I enroll in health insurance and dental options?
A: Employees can enroll in health insurance and dental options during the annual open enrollment period, which typically occurs in November. New hires are eligible to enroll within 30 days of their start date. To begin the enrollment process, log into the employee portal and navigate to the 'Benefits' section. There, you will find detailed information about the available health and dental plans, including coverage options and costs. If you have questions or need assistance, please contact the HR benefits team at benefits@company.com or call extension 1234. Once you have made your selections, ensure you submit your enrollment by the deadline, which is usually the last day of the open enrollment period. Changes to your benefits can only be made outside of this period if you experience a qualifying life event, such as marriage or the birth of a child.
